description_long: This object is a single slice of layered cake displayed on a round, wooden cake stand with a dark pedestal base. The cake slice features alternating layers of rich chocolate sponge and white cream filling, with the top covered in a glossy chocolate ganache. The sides of the cake reveal the distinct, even layers, and there are small red specks visible in the cream, suggesting the presence of fruit or flavoring. The cake slice is triangular, with a smooth, shiny top and slightly textured sides. The cake stand has a faceted edge and a natural wood grain appearance, providing a rustic yet elegant presentation.
description: A slice of layered chocolate and cream cake with a glossy top, displayed on a wooden cake stand.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the cake's layered structure and the glossy chocolate top, with the cake stand's faceted edge visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the vertical layers of chocolate and cream, with the cake's pointed end facing away.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the even, horizontal layers and the smooth chocolate ganache top.
description_view_3: Front view showing the cream-filled side with red specks and the triangular shape of the cake slice.
